---
title: "Fulbert Archer"
---

## Fulbert Archer

**Dates:** (1825-1904)

### Description

Second cousin of CMY, a barrister who emigrated to New Zealand

### Biography

CMY’s grandfather, the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Cornwood, had a sister who married into the Archer family, he was her grandson.  He was a brother of the Rev. Samuel Harward Archer and of the Rev. Charles Harward Archer. [LG 1952 Archer of Trelaske]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
